name: Wand of Teeming Ghosts (9th-Rank Spell)
description:
This pale wooden wand is carved to resemble a thigh bone with metal caps at each end. Ghostly tendrils seem to swirl around it every so often.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast False Vitality at 9th rank. During the duration of the spell, wisps that resemble spirits flit around you as long as you have any temporary Hit Points from false life, and you can use the following action.

Activation (Free Action) envision

Trigger You successfully impart the Frightened 1 condition to a creature

Requirements You have at least 1 temporary Hit Point from false life

Effect You end false life and increase the creature's frightened condition value to 2.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of False Life at 9th rank
